title: Grafana Dashboard Data Source Connection Failure
symptoms: Grafana dashboards showing 'Data source is not available' errors
InfluxDB data source health check failing in Grafana
Grafana logs showing connection refused to old InfluxDB endpoint
New InfluxDB host healthy and accepting queries directly
Only InfluxDB-backed panels affected, Prometheus panels working
root_cause: Infrastructure migration of InfluxDB to new host was completed without updating the Grafana data source configuration to point to the new endpoint
resolution: Updated Grafana data source configuration with the new InfluxDB endpoint, verified all dashboard panels loading correctly, and implemented data source health monitoring
preventive_actions: Create infrastructure migration checklist including all downstream consumer updates
Implement Grafana data source health monitoring with alerts
Use DNS-based service endpoints instead of IP addresses for data sources
Add data source connectivity verification to infrastructure migration playbooks
Implement automated data source configuration testing

timeline.event: Grafana data source health check begins failing for InfluxDB
Dashboard panels start showing data source error messages
EU operations team notices dashboard errors
Nina Patel notified, begins investigating data source connectivity
Old InfluxDB endpoint confirmed unreachable, migration records found
New InfluxDB endpoint identified and verified accessible
Grafana data source configuration updated with new endpoint
All dashboards loading correctly, connection verified stable
Incident resolved, missed SLA alerts reviewed

embedding_summary: Grafana lost connection to InfluxDB data source after infrastructure migration changed the host without updating Grafana configuration. 45 dashboards showed errors for 50 minutes. Two SLA alerts missed. Resolved by updating data source endpoint configuration.
